About Me

profile

Hi, I'm Ifeoma Stephanie — I build custom, multi-node automation systems that solve real business problems. I design AI agents, chatbots, and automated workflows that connect the tools businesses already use: n8n, Zapier, WhatsApp, Telegram, Google Sheets, and CRM platforms.

My work spans the full automation stack — AI agents that hold real conversations with customers, multi-step workflows that route leads and log data, and integrations that trigger the right action at exactly the right moment. I focus on building systems that aren't just functional, but secure, reliable, and easy to maintain.

Every workflow I build is designed to take repetitive, manual work off your plate — replying to customers, logging leads, scheduling appointments, generating content — so it happens automatically, day or night. Reliable, detail-oriented, and committed to automations that hold up in production, not just in a demo.

Services Offered

6 services
01 / Trigger

AI Agent & Chatbot Development

I design and build AI agents and chatbots that hold real, natural conversations instead of following a rigid script. They answer customer questions, qualify leads, and hand off to a human only when it actually matters.

Each agent is connected to your live business data, so its answers stay accurate as your business changes — not frozen at the moment it was built.

tools: OpenAI, n8n AI Agent, custom memory & tools
02 / Connect

WhatsApp & Telegram Automation

I connect WhatsApp and Telegram directly to your business systems, so every incoming message can trigger a reply, a booking, or a CRM update without anyone touching a keyboard.

This turns a messaging app into a working front desk — available around the clock, consistent every time, and tied directly to what's actually happening in your business.

tools: WhatsApp API, Telegram Bot API, n8n
03 / Process

Workflow & CRM Automation

I build multi-node automations in n8n and Zapier that connect Google Sheets, CRMs, and the tools you already use into one coordinated system, instead of a pile of disconnected apps.

The goal is always the same: cut out the repetitive manual work — copying data, updating records, chasing follow-ups — so your team spends time on decisions, not data entry.

tools: n8n, Zapier, Google Sheets, CRM platforms
04 / Sync

API & Webhook Integrations

I connect different apps and platforms through APIs and webhooks, so your systems exchange data automatically and stay in sync in real time, without manual exports or copy-pasting.

Whether it's a form, a payment, or a third-party tool, I make sure the right data reaches the right place the moment it happens.

tools: REST APIs, Webhooks, HTTP Request nodes
05 / Route

Lead Capture & Form Routing

I build systems that catch every form submission the moment it comes in, log it cleanly, and route it to the right person or channel based on what it actually says — billing, support, sales, or general inquiries.

Nothing sits unread in an inbox, and nothing gets sent to the wrong team.

tools: Webhooks, Google Forms, Paths/conditional logic
06 / Generate

AI Content & Image Generation

I build pipelines where an AI agent researches a topic live on the web, drafts content from it, and — where needed — hands off to a second agent to generate matching visuals.

Useful for LinkedIn posts, marketing content, or anywhere you need a steady output of on-brand material without starting from a blank page every time.

tools: AI Agents, Tavily research, image generation

Automations in production

7 workflows
trigger: Telegram message ✓ success

Telegram AI Support Agent

An AI agent reads incoming Telegram messages, pulls live business context from a connected Google Sheet, and replies with accurate, personalized customer support — no human needed for the first response.

Telegram → AI Agent → Google Sheets → Telegram reply
trigger: Webhook (POST) ✓ success

Lead Capture & Management System

Every form submission lands in a webhook, gets written straight into a centralized Google Sheets database, and triggers an instant confirmation email — so no lead waits, and nothing gets lost in an inbox.

Webhook → Google Sheets → Gmail confirmation
trigger: Chat message received ✓ success

AI Chat Assistant with Scheduling & CRM Sync

A conversational AI agent handles live customer support, books appointments straight into Google Calendar, and logs every interaction back to a CRM sheet — turning a chat window into a full booking desk.

Chat trigger → AI Agent → Google Calendar + Sheets
trigger: Manual run ✓ success

Automated LinkedIn Content Generator

Pulls topic data from Google Sheets, researches it live via an HTTP request, then hands it to an AI agent to draft a ready-to-post LinkedIn update — saved straight back to the sheet for review.

Google Sheets → Research API → AI Agent → Google Sheets
trigger: Form submission ✓ success

Conditional Form Response & Routing System

Logs every form submission to Google Sheets, then branches with a conditional check to send the right automated email response depending on what the submission actually says.

Form → Google Sheets → If condition → Gmail (branch A / B)
trigger: New form response ✓ success

Multi-Channel Support Routing

Built on Zapier Paths — incoming form responses are automatically sorted into Technical, Billing, or General Support, each routed to the right channel: Slack, Gmail, or a logged Google Sheets row.

Google Forms → Paths → Slack / Gmail / Sheets
trigger: Form submission ✓ success

AI Research & Image Generation Pipeline

A two-stage AI pipeline: the first agent researches the submission live on the web, the second refines that research into a prompt that generates a custom image — delivered automatically by email.

Form → AI Agent + Web Research → AI Agent → Image Gen → Gmail
